allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /twitter|linkedin|github|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /^\(Lucide\)?\(Share|External|Link|Rss|AtSign|MessageCircle|Send|Users|Code\)/i.test\(k\) && !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,20\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
